title: Pseudo-Class Mastery
description: Boss challenge: Style interactive states using pseudo-classes like :hover, :first-child, and :nth-child to create a polished navigation menu
html:
• Home
  • Products
  • Services
  • About
  • Contact

validationRules.message: The nav should have no list bullets
Links should have dark text color (#333)
The first nav item's link should be bold
Odd nav items should have a light background

hints.text: Pseudo-classes target elements in specific states. :first-child selects the first element, :nth-child(odd) targets alternating elements.
Chain pseudo-classes: .nav-item:first-child a { font-weight: bold; } and .nav-item:nth-child(odd) { background-color: whitesmoke; }
Style .nav-item as inline-block, remove link underlines, use :first-child for bold and :nth-child(odd) for alternating backgrounds.
